ac_evidence.ac: Inventory manager with methods: AddResource, RemoveResource, GetAvailable, TransferResource
Storage building types: Granary (food, 1000kg), Warehouse (goods, 500 units), OutdoorPile (200 units, high spoilage)
ac_evidence.evidence: StorageBuilding type constants and Capacity() method in storage.go

ac_evidence.ac: Capacity limits enforced per storage type
Spoilage system: different rates per resource type (grain 1x, vegetables 2x, meat 3x, bread 0.5x)
ac_evidence.evidence: Updated SpoilageRate in constants.go, TestSpoilageRate passes

ac_evidence.ac: Spoilage affected by storage quality (0.5x for good storage, 2.0x for poor)
Quality degradation when spoilage exceeds threshold
Stock alerts when resources fall below configurable thresholds

ac_evidence.evidence: Resource.Produced field, WeeksSince function, spoilage calculations

ac_evidence.ac: Unit tests covering all inventory operations and spoilage scenarios

existing_work_summary: Existing economy package had resource types, spoilage rates, constants, and simulation integration. No inventory or storage system present. Added inventory, storage, spoilage modules.
